title: Analyse business performance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Analyse business performance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Analyse financial reports

pcs.text: Interpret taxation reports and determine accounts to be true and fair
